sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الْأَطْفَالُ يَجْلِسُونَ أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ لِسَاعَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su počela sjediti ispred ekrana mnogo sati.
sentences.translationEn: Children have started sitting in front of screens for many hours.

sentences.arabic: يُؤَثِّرُ ذَلِكَ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْعَيْنِ وَالنَّوْمِ بِشَكْلٍ سَلْبِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: To negativno utiče na zdravlje očiju i san.
sentences.translationEn: That affects eye health and sleep negatively.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِمُمَارَسَةِ الرِّيَاضَةِ بَدَلًا مِنَ الْأَلْعَابِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju bavljenje sportom umjesto elektronskih igara.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors advise practicing sports instead of electronic games.

sentences.arabic: التَّوَازُنُ بَيْنَ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا وَالْحَيَاةِ الْحَقِيقِيَّةِ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Ravnoteža između tehnologije i stvarnog života je veoma važna.
sentences.translationEn: The balance between technology and real life is very important.
